title: Stir-Fried Beetroot with Bittersweet French Sauce
description: A sweet and savory Thai-inspired dish featuring stir-fried beetroot in a bittersweet French sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the beetroot and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the Bittersweet French sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions, if desired.
